Baadhi ya STIs zinaweza kuenezwa pia wakati wa uja uzazi, kuzaliwa, na uini, na pia kupitia damu au bidhaa za damu zilizoharibika. STIs zina athari kubwa za kiafya.  Ikiwa haiatibuliwa, zinaweza kusababisha mashambulizi makubwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na magonjwa ya ufuo na moyo, uvivu, mimba iliyopotea, vifo vya watoto, na hatari iliyoongezeka ya ugonjwa wa Ukiritimba wa Binadamu (HIV).

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.reference: Pia zinahusishwa na unyanyapaa, unyanyasaji wa nyumbani, na huathiri ubora wa maisha. Magonjwa mengi ya zinaa hayana dalili. Zinapokuwapo dalili za kawaida za magonjwa ya zinaa ni kutokwa na uchafu ukeni au urethra, kidonda sehemu ya siri na maumivu chini ya tumbo. Magonjwa ya zinaa ya kawaida na yanayotibika ni trichomonas, chlamydia, kisonono na kaswende. Kuongezeka kwa kasi kwa upinzani wa antimicrobial ni tishio linalokua kwa kisonono isiyoweza kutibika.
translations.hypothesis: Hawa pia wamefanyiwa ugonjwa, na wanakabiliwa na mashoga, uvuguzi wa kaya, na huathiri ubora wa maisha. Wengi wa magonjwa ya za kingono (STIs) hawana dalili. Wakati wa kuzuka, dalili za kawaida za magonjwa ya za kingono ni taa ya vaginal au ya urethra, michungano ya tishu ya kibaada, na maumivu ya tumbo chini. Magonjwa ya za kingono yenye ugonjwa zaidi na yasiyoweza kutibika ni trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea na syphilis. Uzinifu wa haraka wa antimicrobial ni hatari inayokuzidi kwa magonjwa ya za kingono ambayo hayana tiba.

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: Magonjwa ya zinaa yatokanayo na VVU, virusi vya herpes simplex ya sehemu za siri (HSV), virusi vya hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) na virusi vya human T-lymphotropic virus aina 1 (HTLV-1) hayana au yana chaguo chache za matibabu. Chanjo zinapatikana kwa hepatitis B ili kuzuia maambukizi ambayo yanaweza kusababisha saratani ya ini na kwa HPV kuzuia saratani ya shingo ya kizazi. VVU, HSV na HTLV-1 ni maambukizi ya maisha yote: kwa VVU na HSV kuna matibabu ambayo yanaweza kukandamiza virusi, lakini kwa sasa hakuna tiba kwa yoyote ya magonjwa haya ya zinaa ya virusi. Kondomu zinazotumiwa kwa usahihi na mara kwa mara ni njia bora za kujikinga na magonjwa ya zinaa na VVU. Uchunguzi na utambuzi wa mapema wa watu wenye magonjwa ya zinaa na wapenzi wao wa ngono hutoa fursa bora ya matibabu ya ufanisi na kuzuia matatizo na maambukizi zaidi.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy:

**Ugonjwa wa Kupendeza wa Wavulana (STIs) kama vile ugonjwa wa HIV, virusi vya herpes simplex vya jenzi (HSV), ugonjwa wa hepatitis vya aina ya virusi, ugonjwa wa papovavirus wa wanadamu (HPV) na ugonjwa wa T-lymphotropic wa wanadamu aina ya 1 (HTLV-1) hupungua au huweka matisho kidogo ya tiba.  Dutu za chanjo zinasambazwa kwa ugonjwa wa hepatitis B ili kuzuia ugonjwa unaosababisha saratani ya ini na kwa HPV ili kuzuia saratani ya paja.  HIV, HSV na HTLV-1 ni magonjwa ya maisha ya milele: kwa HIV na HSV kuna tiba zinazoweza kupunguza uenezaji wa virusi, lakini sasa hivi hakuna tiba za magonjwa haya ya kupendeza ya wavulana.  Kofia za kinga zilizotumika kwa usahihi na kwa daima ni njia za kuaminika za kujizuia magonjwa ya kupendeza na HIV.  Uchunguzi na utambuzi mapema wa watu wenye magonjwa ya kupendeza na washiriki wao wa jinsia hutoa fursa bora ya tiba na pia ya kuzuia uondoaji na kuenea zaidi.**

translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: Dalili: Mtu anaweza kuwa na magonjwa ya zinaa bila kuwa na dalili za wazi za ugonjwa huo. Dalili za kawaida za magonjwa ya zinaa zinapoonekana ni pamoja na: kutokwa na uchafu usio wa kawaida, kutokwa na urethra, vidonda vya sehemu za siri na uvimbe, na maumivu chini ya tumbo. Dalili za magonjwa ya zinaa maalum ni: Kisonono na maambukizi ya chlamydial Magonjwa haya ya zinaa husababisha cervicitis kwa wanawake, urethritis kwa wanaume na maambukizi ya nje ya uzazi, ikiwa ni pamoja na maonyesho ya rectal na oropharyngeal.

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Dalili za kawaida ni pamoja na kutokwa na uchafu ukeni au uume na kuungua kwa kukojoa. Watoto wachanga wa akina mama walioambukizwa wanaweza kuambukizwa kiwambo cha sikio cha mtoto mchanga (macho mekundu) kutokana na kuathiriwa na magonjwa ya zinaa wakati wa kujifungua ukeni. Maambukizi ya rectal na pharyngeal yanaweza kuwa bila dalili. Kaswende: Kaswende mara nyingi haina dalili, dalili zinapotokea, kaswende ya msingi hujidhihirisha kama kidonda cha pekee kisicho na uchungu. Kaswende ya pili inaweza kujidhihirisha kama vidonda vya jumla vinavyoathiri ngozi, utando wa mucous na nodi ya limfu ikijumuisha upele wa kawaida kwenye viganja vya mikono na nyayo za miguu.

Vimizo vya kiganjo na kinywa vinaweza kuwa bila ishara. Shukrani: Shukrani mara nyingi haiontishe, wakati ishara huonekana, shukrani ya kwanza huonekana kama michobo ya pekee, isiyo na maumivu. Shukrani ya pili inaweza kuonekana kama michobo ya jumla inayohusu ngozi, koo na lymph-node, ikiwa na michongo ya kawaida kwenye mikono na taloni.**

**Explanation of some choices:**

*   **Tauni au kinywa cha mume chenye maji:**  This translates "vaginal or penile discharge and water" – aiming for a clear description.

translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.reference: Kaswende iliyojificha haina dalili na ina tabia ya serolojia chanya ya kaswende. Trichomoniasis: Dalili kuu ni pamoja na kutokwa na uchafu usio wa kawaida wa uke na uwekundu wa uke, kuwasha na kujamiiana kwa maumivu. Virusi vya herpes simplex ya sehemu ya siri (HSV) HSV mara nyingi hujidhihirisha kama vidonda vyenye uchungu, vesicles au vidonda kwenye sehemu ya siri ya nje na mdomo. Dalili ya HSV ya sehemu za siri ni hali ya maisha yote ambayo inaweza kuonyeshwa na kujirudia kwa dalili mara kwa mara.

Trichomoniasis: Ishara kuu ni kutiririka kwa maji ya kibaadili kutoka kwa paja na machororo ya kibaada, kuchorrosha na mambo ya kiafya wakati wa ngono.  Virusi vya herpes ya kigeni (HSV) HSV mara nyingi hupa majeraha yenye uchafu, pimples au michongoro kwenye viungo vya kibaada na kinywa. Siplawy ya kigeni yenye matumbo hufanyika kwa muda mrefu na inaweza kuelezwa na upinzani mara kwa mara wa matumbo.**

**Explanation of some choices:**

*   **Siplawy ya siri:**  "Latent syphilis" -  This is a common and understandable way to express the concept.

*   **kinywa:** "mouth"
*   **upinzani mara kwa mara wa matumbo:** "frequent symptomatic recurrences" -  This conveys the recurring nature of the condition.

**Important Note:**  Medical translation is complex.  This translation is a good starting point, but a medical professional fluent in both English and Swahili should review it for accuracy and appropriateness for a specific context (e.g., patient education materials).

translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: Virusi vya T-lymphotropic ya binadamu aina 1 (HTLV-1) Kwa ujumla bila dalili, aina sugu ya HTLV-1 inaweza kusababisha ugonjwa mbaya, ikiwa ni pamoja na T-cell leukemia/lymphoma (ATL) ya watu wazima na hali ya mfumo wa neva inayoendelea inayojulikana kama myelopathy inayohusishwa na HTLV-1 au paraparesis ya kitropiki ya spastic (HAM/TSP). Matibabu: Matibabu madhubuti kwa sasa yanapatikana kwa magonjwa kadhaa ya zinaa STIs. Magonjwa matatu ya zinaa ya kibakteria (klamidia, kisonono na kaswende) na moja ya vimelea vya magonjwa ya zinaa (trichomoniasis) kwa kawaida hutibika kwa kutumia dawa zilizopo, zenye ufanisi za dozi moja au za dozi nyingi regimens ya antibiotiki. Kwa magonjwa ya zinaa ya virusi (VVU, HSV na HTLV-1), dawa zinazofaa zaidi zinazopatikana ni dawa za kuzuia virusi au za saratani (kwa upande wa HTLV-1), ambazo zinaweza kurekebisha mwendo wa magonjwa, ingawa haziwezi kuponya haya matatu.

**Virus wa T-seli ya binadamu aina ya 1 (HTLV-1) Kwa kawaida hauna dalili, lakini fomu ya kudumu ya HTLV-1 inaweza kusababisha ugonjwa mgumu, ikiwa ni pamoja na ugonjwa wa T-seli ya binadamu mzuri/kansa (ATL) na hali ya mfumo mkuu wa neva inavyoendelea inayojulikana kama ugonjwa wa HTLV-1 na myelopathy ya Kiafrika au spastic paraparesis ya Kiafrika (HAM/TSP).  Matibabu:  Matibabu bora sasa yanaopo kwa ugonjwa mwingi wa ugonjwa wa kiawanyekundu (STIs).  Ugonjwa wa kiawanyekundu wa bakteria tatu (chlamydia, gonorea na syphilis) na ugonjwa wa kiawanyekundu mmoja (trichomoniasis) mara nyingi huzuishwa na tiba ya tiba tofauti au matibabu kadhaa ya dawa za bakteria zilizopo na zina ufanisi. Kwa ugonjwa wa kiawanyekundu (HIV, HSV na HTLV-1), dawa bora zaidi zinazopatikana ni dawa za antiviral au dawa za kulemaeleza (katika kesi ya HTLV-1), ambazo zinaweza kubadilisha mwelekeo wa magonjwa hayo, lakini si zilizowawezesha tiba za magonjwa hayo.**

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **HTLV-1:**  I've kept the abbreviation as it's commonly used in medical contexts.

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.reference: Ukinzani wa viua viini (AMR) kwa viua vijasumu vinavyotumika kutibu magonjwa ya zinaa STIs, hasa kisonono, umeongezeka kwa kasi katika miaka ya hivi karibuni na umepunguza matokeo ya matibabu yaliyofaulu. Matokeo kutoka kwa Mpango wa sasa wa Ufuatiliaji wa Gonococcal AMR (GASP) yanaonyesha mwelekeo wa viwango vya juu vya ukinzani wa kwinoloni, kuongezeka kwa upinzani wa azithromycin na kuibuka kwa upinzani wa cephalosporins za wigo uliopanuliwa. Kujitokeza kwa kupungua kwa unyeti wa kisonono kwa cephalosporins ya wigo mpana, pamoja na viwango vya juu vya upinzani dhidi ya penicillins, sulfonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones na macrolides hufanya kisonono kuwa kiumbe sugu kwa dawa nyingi. AMR kwa magonjwa mengine ya zinaa STIs, ingawa si ya kawaida, pia ipo, na hivyo kufanya kuzuia na matibabu ya haraka kuwa muhimu. Ili kutibu ipasavyo magonjwa ya zinaa ni muhimu kuchukua dawa zinazofaa za kuua viini, pamoja na kipimo sahihi na muda wa magonjwa ya zinaa ili kuhakikisha matibabu au tiba ya kutosha, na kuzuia ukuzaji wa ukinzani wa viini.

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: Ndui Muhtasari: Ndui ni ugonjwa wa kuambukiza kwa papo hapo unaosababishwa na virusi vya variola, mwanachama wa familia ya orthopoxvirus. Ilikuwa ni moja ya magonjwa mabaya zaidi yanayojulikana kwa wanadamu na kusababisha mamilioni ya vifo kabla ya kutokomezwa. Inaaminika kuwa imekuwepo kwa angalau miaka 3000. Chanjo ya ndui, iliyoundwa na Edward Jenner mnamo 1796, ilikuwa chanjo ya kwanza iliyofanikiwa kutengenezwa.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and natural-sounding language:

**Muhtasari wa Miali:** Miali ni ugonjwa mgumu wa kuambukizwa unaosababishwa na virusi vya variola, ambazo ni sehemu ya familia ya orthopoxvirus. Ilikuwa moja wao wa hatari zaidi ya magonjwa yaliyojulikana duniani na kusababisha vifo milioni kabla ilikumbatiwa. Inakubalika kwamba ilikuwepo kwa angalau miaka 3000.  Chanjo ya miali, iliyoundwa na Edward Jenner mwaka 1796, ilikuwa chanjo ya kwanza ya mafanikio yaliyoundwa.

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

*   **Muhtasari wa Miali:**  "Muhtasari" translates to "overview" or "summary."  "Miali" is the Swahili word for "smallpox."
*   **ugonjwa mgumu wa kuambukizwa:** This translates to "acute contagious disease." "Mgumu" means acute, and "kuambukizwa" means contagious.
*   **unaosababishwa na virusi vya variola:** "Unaosababishwa" means "caused by."
*   **ambazo ni sehemu ya familia ya orthopoxvirus:** "Ambazo" refers back to the virus. "Sehemu ya" means "part of" and "familia" means "family."
*   **Ilikuwa moja wao wa hatari zaidi:** "Ilikuwa" means "it was." "Wao" refers to the diseases. "Hatari zaidi" means "most dangerous."
*   **kusababisha vifo milioni kabla ilikumbatiwa:** "kusababisha vifo" means "caused deaths." "Milioni" means "millions." "Kabla ilikumbatiwa" means "before it was eradicated."
*   **Inakubalika kwamba ilikuwepo kwa angalau miaka 3000:** "Inakubalika kwamba" means "it is believed that." "Ilikuwepo" means "it existed." "Kwa angalau" means "for at least."
*   **Chanjo ya miali, iliyoundwa na Edward Jenner mwaka 1796, ilikuwa chanjo ya kwanza ya mafanikio yaliyoundwa:** This translates to "The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine developed."  "Chanjo" means "vaccine." "iliyoundwa" means "created." "ya mafanikio" means "successful." "yaliyoundwa" means "developed."

I've aimed for a translation that is both accurate and reads naturally in Swahili.  If you'd like me to refine any part of the translation or provide alternative phrasing, just let me know!

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: Aliona kuwa wahudumu wa maziwa ambao hapo awali walishika ndui hawakupata ugonjwa wa ndui na alionyesha kuwa chanjo kama hiyo inaweza kutumika kuzuia ugonjwa wa ndui kwa watu wengine. Shirika la Afya Ulimwenguni lilizindua mpango ulioimarishwa wa kutokomeza ugonjwa wa ndui mnamo 1967. Chanjo iliyoenea na ufuatiliaji ulifanyika duniani kote kwa miaka kadhaa. Kisa cha mwisho kilichojulikana kilikuwa Somalia mnamo 1977. Mnamo 1980 WHO ilitangaza kutokomeza ugonjwa wa ndui - ugonjwa pekee wa kuambukiza kufikia tofauti hii.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Alangazia kwamba wasindikaji wa maziwa walioambukizwa na mafumbo ya ng’ombe haukuchukua mafumbo ya ukungu, na alionyesha kwamba uingizwavu kama huyu unaweza kutumika kuzuia ukungu katika watu wengine. Shirikisho wa Afya Duniani (WHO) kilianzisha mpango wa kuimarisha ili kukomesha ukungu mwaka wa 1967.  Ulinzi wa chanjo na ufuatiliaji uliendekezwa kwa ujumla duniani kote kwa miaka kadhaa.  Kesi ya asilia mwisho ilitajwa nchini Somalia mwaka wa 1977.  Mnamo 1980, WHO iliahidi kukomesha ukungu – ndiyo ugonjwa pekee wa kuambukizwa kuifikia heshima hii.**

**Explanation of some choices:**

*   **Alangazia kwamba:** "He observed that" - A common and natural way to express observation in Swahili.
*   **wasindikaji wa maziwa:** "milkmaids" -  A direct translation, though the concept of "milkmaids" might be less common in modern Swahili usage.
*   **mafumbo ya ng’ombe:** "cowpox" -  "Mafumbo" is a good translation for "pox" in this context.
*   **ukungu:** "smallpox" - Standard Swahili term.
*   **uingizwavu kama huyu:** "a similar inoculation" -  This captures the idea of a repeated inoculation.
*   **Shirikisho wa Afya Duniani (WHO):** "World Health Organization" -  The standard Swahili translation.
*   **kuimarisha mpango:** "intensified plan" -  "Kuimarisha" conveys the idea of strengthening or intensifying.
*   **kukomesha ukungu:** "to eradicate smallpox" -  A common and direct translation.
*   **Ulinzi wa chanjo na ufuatiliaji:** "Widespread immunization and surveillance" -  Clear and accurate.
*   **kwa ujumla duniani kote:** "around the world" -  A standard phrase.
*   **Kesi ya asilia mwisho:** "The last known natural case" -  "Asilia" means natural.
*   **iliahidi kukomesha ukungu:** "declared smallpox eradicated" - "Iliahidi" means declared or announced.

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: Hii inasalia kuwa miongoni mwa mafanikio mashuhuri na makubwa ya afya ya umma katika historia. Dalili: Dalili za awali za ndui ni pamoja na homa kali, uchovu na maumivu makali ya mgongo, na mara chache zaidi, maumivu ya tumbo na kutapika. Siku mbili hadi 3 baadaye virusi hutoa upele wenye tabia ya matuta yaliyojaa kioevu wazi, ambayo baadaye hujaa na usaha na hatimaye kuendeleza ukoko ambao hukauka na kumomonyoka. Upele huanza kwenye uso na mikono, kisha huenea kwa mwili wote. Vidonda vinakua kwenye utando wa mucous wa pua na mdomo na vidonda mara baada ya kuundwa.
translations.hypothesis: Hii bado ni mojawapo ya mafanikio muhimu na ya kina zaidi ya afya ya umma katika historia. Ishara: Ishara za mapema za ukunduzi zinaweza kuwa joto kali, uchovu na maumivu makali ya nyuma, na kwa mara si nadra, maumivu ya tumbo na kutoga. Miaka mitatu hadi miaka miwili baadaye, virusi huunda michwecheo ya sifa inayojulikana na majani ya wazi, ambayo hifadhi baadaye na kuwaka na mwishoni mwa mwisho huunda ngozi inayokufa na kuanguka. Michwecheo huanza kwenye uso na mikono, kisha huenea kote mwoteni. Uchafu huunda kwenye koo na kinywa na hupungua mara tu huundwa.

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.reference: Ndui huambukizwa kutoka kwa mtu hadi kwa mtu kupitia matone ya kuambukiza wakati wa kuwasiliana kwa karibu na watu walioambukizwa ambao wana dalili za ugonjwa huo, au katika visa vingine kupitia nguo zilizochafuliwa na matandiko. Ina kipindi cha incubation cha siku 7-17 baada ya kuambukizwa na huambukiza mara tu homa inapoanza. Watu hubakia kuambukizwa hadi vipele vya mwisho vitoke. Ndui iliua hadi asilimia 30 ya visa.Kadi ya utambuzi wa ndui ya WHO Jibu la WHO: Kipindi tangu kutokomezwa kimefafanuliwa na mjadala mrefu na tata unaolenga uharibifu wa hifadhi ya mwisho iliyobaki ya virusi vya variola hai.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Poxu yaikuwa hutuşirije kutoka mtu hadi mtu kupitia vituo vya mimba ambavyo vinaundwa wakati wa mwangwi na watu walioathirika wenye alama za ugonjwa huo, au katika kesi fulani kupitia vishati na koti za kulala zilizotuzwa. Inapokuwa na kipindi cha kuota cha siku 7-17 baada ya uingizaji, na haifanyi kuwaambukiza hadi afya iwe na kiu. Watu wakoambukizaji hadi nyuzi za mwisho zilizikata zikatokea. Poxu yaikuwa ya kufa katika hadi 30% ya kesi. Shirika la Afya ya Dunia (WHO) taa ya poxu ya WHO jibu: kipindi tangu kusafisha kilifafanuliwa na mjadala mrefu na ngumu uliovukuzwa kwa uharibufu wa hisas zako za awali za virusi vya mimba.**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **Poxu yaikuwa:**  "Smallpox" -  A common and understandable Swahili term for smallpox.
*   **hutuşirije:** "is transmitted" -  A good verb for transmission.
*   **vituo vya mimba:** "infective droplets" -  This captures the essence of droplets carrying the disease.
*   **mwangwi:** "close contact" -  A suitable term for close physical contact.
*   **alama za ugonjwa huo:** "symptoms of the disease" -  Clear and direct.
*   **vishati na koti za kulala zilizotuzwa:** "contaminated clothing and bedding" -  Accurately describes the source of contamination.
*   **kipindi cha kuota:** "incubation period" - Standard translation.
*   **uingizaji:** "exposure" -  Appropriate term for exposure to the disease.
*   **haifanyi kuwaambukiza:** "only becomes infectious" -  Expresses the condition clearly.
*   **afya iwe na kiu:** "once a fever develops" -  A common Swahili idiom to express the onset of fever.
*   **nyuzi za mwisho zilizikata zikatokea:** "until the last scabs fall off" -  A more descriptive and natural way to phrase this.
*   **Shirika la Afya ya Dunia (WHO):** "World Health Organization (WHO)" - Standard translation.
*   **tataa ya poxu ya WHO jibu:** "WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response" -  Translated to reflect the meaning of the card and response.

**Important Note:**  Swahili has regional variations. This translation aims for a generally understandable version.  If you need a translation for a specific region (e.g., Tanzania, Kenya, Uganda), the wording might need slight adjustments to be more natural in that dialect.

translations.source: In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories – one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: Mnamo 1996, katika Mkutano wa 49 wa Afya Ulimwenguni, Nchi Wanachama ziliamua kuharibu hisa mnamo Juni 1999, na kuruhusu tu sampuli ndogo kuhifadhiwa kwa madhumuni ya utafiti katika maabara mbili zilizowekwa salama - moja nchini Merika na moja katika Urusi. Uhifadhi wa muda wa hifadhi zilizopo za virusi vya variola hutumiwa kwa utafiti zaidi muhimu, ambao unasimamiwa na Kamati ya Ushauri ya Utafiti wa Virusi vya Variola. Kikundi hiki hukutana kila mwaka. Sekretarieti ya Ugonjwa wa Ndui ya WHO iliyoko Makao Makuu ya WHO inaratibu shughuli zote zinazohusiana na kutokomeza ndui na baada ya kutokomeza. Hizi ni pamoja na kusimamia utafiti unaoidhinishwa na virusi vya variola hai kwa ajili ya kutengeneza hatua za kupinga kama vile chanjo na dawa za kuzuia virusi.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Katika Mkutazaji wa Dunia wa Afya wa 49, uliofanyika mwaka 1996, Nchi Mshiriki zilionganisha kuharibu hisa hii mapema Juni 1999, na kuruhusu tu sampuli ndogo zihifadhiwe kwa madai ya utafiti katika vyumba viwili maalumu vya salama – mojawapo katika Marekani na mojawapo katika Fedhara ya Urusi. Uhifadhi wa muda wa hisa zilizopo za virusi vya variola hutumiwa kwa utafiti muhimu zaidi, ambao unaangulizwa na Baraza Kuchagizwa kwa Utaratibu wa Utafiti wa Virusi vya Variola. Kundi hili kikutana kwa mara moja ya kila mwaka. Serekala la Kuudhi wa Kuudhi la WHO, lililojumuishwa katika Ofisi Kuu ya WHO, inaendesha shughuli zote za uharibifu wa kuudhi na shughuli za baada ya kuudhi. Hizi ni pamoja na uongozi wa utafiti uliokubaliwa wa matumizi ya virusi vya variola hai kwa maendeleo ya hatua kama vile chanjo na tiba za virusi.**

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **"World Health Assembly"**: Translated as "Mkutazaji wa Dunia wa Afya" (World Assembly of Health).

*   **"Smallpox Secretariat"**: Translated as "Serekala la Kuudhi wa Kuudhi" (Secretariat of Smallpox Eradication).
*   **"Countermeasures"**: Translated as "hatua" (steps/measures).

I have aimed for a translation that is both accurate and understandable to a Swahili speaker.  If you'd like me to refine any part of the translation or provide alternative phrasing, please let me know!

translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include:
translations.reference: Tangu enzi ya kutokomeza, chanjo salama na matibabu mahususi yametengenezwa kwa ugonjwa wa ndui na magonjwa yanayohusiana kama vile ndui ya nyani. Sekretarieti pia inawajibika kwa maandalizi ya dharura na inasimamia hifadhi ya dharura ya chanjo ya ndui katika tukio lisilowezekana kwamba ugonjwa huo utaibuka tena. Sekretarieti inasimamia ukaguzi wa usalama wa viumbe na usalama wa viumbe hai wa hifadhi zilizoidhinishwa za virusi vya variola kama ilivyoagizwa na Baraza la Afya Ulimwenguni, na kuhakikisha ripoti ya kila mwaka kwa Mashirika Yanayoongoza ya WHO. Sekretarieti ya Ndui inaunga mkono Hifadhi za WHO katika kuhifadhi historia ya kimataifa ya ndui na kuweka kumbukumbu za mafunzo tuliyopata kutokana na kutokomeza kabisa ugonjwa wa ndui. Majukumu ya sasa ya Sekretarieti na wajibu wa Ndui kwa WHO ni pamoja na:

Seketaria pia anayehimili ni pamoja na tathmini ya taharushi na huendesha hisabu ya chanjo ya mpingo ya dharura katika tukio la ugonjwa kuenea tena. Seketaria huendesha masafari ya usalama wa biolojia na usalama wa biolojia ya makipa wa virusi vya variola yaliyoidhinishwa, kama ilivyotawanyika na Kamati ya Afya ya Dunia, na kuhakikisha taarifa ya kila mwaka kwa Wizazi wa WHO. Seketaria wa Mpingo huunga mkono Arifa za WHO katika kuhifadhi historia ya dunia ya mpingo na kuchunguza somo zilizofunzika kutoka kwa uondoaji wa matananga. Majengo ya sasa na majumuisho ya Seketaria wa Mpingo ni pamoja na:**

I've used "masiyo ya Kiafrika" to specify that monkeypox is not African, as it's a zoonotic disease.
*   **"Secretariat"**: Translated as "Seketaria" (Secretary/Secretariat).

translations.source: Variola virus research and development of countermeasures organizing annual meetings of the WHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) coordinating review of research proposals for work with variola virus through the ACVVR managing relationships with the two variola virus repositories (which are also WHO Collaborating Centres) recording, processing and monitoring requests from researchers for variola virus DNA from the 2 repositories under specific rules
translations.reference: Utafiti wa virusi vya Variola na maendeleo ya hatua za kupinga kuandaa mikutano ya kila mwaka ya Kamati ya Ushauri ya WHO kuhusu Utafiti wa Virusi vya Variola (ACVVR) kuratibu mapitio ya mapendekezo ya utafiti wa kufanya kazi na virusi vya variola kupitia ACVVR kusimamia mahusiano hazina na virusi viwili vya variola (ambazo pia ni Vituo vya Kushirikiana vya WHO) kurekodi, kuchakata na kufuatilia maombi kutoka kwa watafiti wa DNA ya virusi vya variola kutoka kwa hazina 2 chini ya sheria maalum.

translations.source: maintaining and managing the smallpox global vaccine stockpile coordinating development of a laboratory network for orthopoxvirus detection and diagnostics developing normative guidance and response strategies for human monkeypox and other orthopoxviruses supporting capacity-building and developing training materials contributing to global health security initiatives
translations.reference: kudumisha na kusimamia hifadhi ya kimataifa ya chanjo ya ndui kuratibu maendeleo ya mtandao wa maabara kwa utambuzi na uchunguzi wa virusi vya orthopox kuunda mwongozo wa kawaida na mikakati ya kukabiliana na ndui ya nyani kwa binadamu na virusi vingine vya (ndui) orthopox kusaidia kujenga uwezo na kuendeleza nyenzo za mafunzo kuchangia mipango ya usalama wa afya duniani
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Msaidizi wa Ulinzi wa Ugonjwa wa Pox: Utanishi na Usimamizi wa Hisa ya Chanua za Dunia, Ushirikiano katika Uundaji wa Mtandao wa Mitaalamu wa Uchambuzi wa Orthopoxvirus, Kutengeneza Miongozo na Mikakati ya Majibu kwa Mpaka wa Pox na Orthopoxvirus Vingi, Kupambana na Ukuaji wa Uwezo na Kutoa Nyenzo za Mafunzo, na Kushiriki katika Mashuhuri ya Afya Duniani.**

**Breakdown of the translation and some notes:**

*   **Msaidizi wa Ulinzi wa Ugonjwa wa Pox:** (Helper for Smallpox Protection) - This is a more descriptive and accurate way to convey the overall theme.
*   **Utanishi na Usimamizi wa Hisa ya Chanua za Dunia:** (Maintaining and Managing the Global Smallpox Vaccine Stockpile) -  Direct translation, clear and understandable.
*   **Ushirikiano katika Uundaji wa Mtandao wa Mitaalamu wa Uchambuzi wa Orthopoxvirus:** (Coordinating development of a laboratory network for orthopoxvirus detection and diagnostics) -  "Ushirikiano" (coordination/collaboration) is a good fit. "Mitaalamu wa Uchambuzi" (laboratory professionals/analysts) is a common way to describe lab personnel.
*   **Kutengeneza Miongozo na Mikakati ya Majibu kwa Mpaka wa Pox na Orthopoxvirus Vingi:** (Developing normative guidance and response strategies for human monkeypox and other orthopoxviruses) - "Kutengeneza" (to develop/create) is appropriate. "Miongozo" (guidance) and "Mikakati ya Majibu" (response strategies) are standard terms.
*   **Kupambana na Ukuaji wa Uwezo na Kutoa Nyenzo za Mafunzo:** (Supporting capacity-building and developing training materials) - "Kupambana na Ukuaji wa Uwezo" (strengthening capacity) is a common phrase. "Kutoa Nyenzo za Mafunzo" (providing training materials) is a clear translation.
*   **na Kushiriki katika Mashuhuri ya Afya Duniani:** (Contributing to global health security initiatives) - "Kushiriki" (to contribute) and "Mashuhuri ya Afya Duniani" (global health initiatives) are suitable terms.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Swahili, like any language, has nuances.  If this text is part of a larger document, the context might require slight adjustments to the translation.
*   **Regional Variations:** Swahili has regional variations (e.g., Mainland Swahili vs. Coastal Swahili).  This translation aims for a generally understood form.
*   **Technical Terminology:**  For highly technical documents, it's crucial to ensure the Swahili terms used are the most accepted and used within the relevant field (e.g., public health, virology).

Would you like me to refine this translation further, perhaps focusing on a specific aspect or target audience?

translations.source: Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.
translations.reference: Kuhifadhi historia ya ndui duniani kusimamia kumbukumbu za Mpango wa Kutokomeza Ugonjwa wa Ndui kwa ushirikiano na Shirika la Kumbukumbu la WHO na Maktaba ya WHO kuongoza mijadala ya sera na matukio ya ukumbusho kuhusu kutokomeza ugonjwa wa ndui kuripoti kila mwaka kwa Bodi ya Utendaji ya WHO na Bunge la Afya Ulimwenguni Sekretarieti pia hukusanya na kusimamia ufadhili wa shughuli hizi na kwa matukio ya dharura kama inavyohitajika kama vile mashauriano ya kiufundi na mafunzo.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**"Uhakiri wa historia ya ugonjwa wa smallpox kimondo, ukishika hati za programu ya kuondoa ugonjwa wa smallpox kwa ushirikiano na hati za WHO na maktaba ya WHO, na kuongoza katika mjadala wa sera na tamasha za kumbusu kuhusu uondoaji wa ugonjwa wa smallpox.  Hata hivyo, huandika taarifa kila mwaka kwa Baraza la Katibuni la WHO na Kamati ya Afya ya Dunia.  Seketarieti pia inahamasisha na kudhibiti fedha kwa shughuli hizi na tamasha kadhaa kama ilivyohitajika, kama vile mashauriano ya kiufundi na kozi."**

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

*   **"Uhakiri wa historia ya ugonjwa wa smallpox kimondo"** -  This translates "Preserving global smallpox history" –  "Uhakiri" means preservation, "historia" is history, "ugonjwa wa smallpox" is smallpox, and "kimondo" emphasizes the global aspect.
*   **"ukishika hati za programu ya kuondoa ugonjwa wa smallpox kwa ushirikiano na hati za WHO na maktaba ya WHO"** - This translates "overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library."  "ukishika" means overseeing, "hati" means archives, "kuondoa" means eradication, "ushirikiano" means collaboration.
*   **"na kuongoza katika mjadala wa sera na tamasha za kumbusu kuhusu uondoaji wa ugonjwa wa smallpox."** - This translates "leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication." "kuongoza" means leading, "mjadala wa sera" is policy discussion, "tamasha za kumbusu" are commemorative events, and "kuondoaji" is eradication.
*   **"Hata hivyo, huandika taarifa kila mwaka kwa Baraza la Katibuni la WHO na Kamati ya Afya ya Dunia."** - This translates "reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly." "huandika taarifa" means reporting, "kila mwaka" means annually, "Baraza la Katibuni" is the Executive Board, and "Kamati ya Afya ya Dunia" is the World Health Assembly.
*   **"Seketarieti pia inahamasisha na kudhibiti fedha kwa shughuli hizi na tamasha kadhaa kama ilivyohitajika, kama vile mashauriano ya kiufundi na kozi."** - This translates "The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training." "Seketarieti" is Secretariat, "inahamasisha na kudhibiti fedha" means mobilizes and manages funding, "shughuli hizi" are these activities, "tamasha kadhaa" are ad hoc events, "mashauriano ya kiufundi na kozi" are technical consultations and training.

**Important Note:**  Swahili has many regional variations. This translation aims for a standard, widely understood form.  If you need a translation tailored to a specific region (e.g., Tanzania, Kenya, Uganda), the wording might need slight adjustments.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments.
translations.reference: Kung'atwa na nyoka Muhtasari: Kuumwa na nyoka ni ugonjwa unaoweza kuhatarisha maisha unaosababishwa na sumu wakati wa kuumwa na nyoka mwenye sumu. Uchafuzi unaweza pia kusababishwa na kunyunyiziwa sumu machoni na aina fulani za nyoka ambao wana uwezo wa kutema sumu kama njia ya kujikinga. Juhudi duni za hapo awali za kudhibiti kuumwa kwa nyoka zimetoa data iliyogawanyika, isiyo sahihi ya epidemiolojia. Waathiriwa wengi hawahudhurii vituo vya afya au hospitali na badala yake wanategemea matibabu ya kienyeji.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Swahili translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy:

**Uvutaji wa Vidudu: Muhtasari**

Uvutaji wa vidudu ni ugonjwa wa hatari sana unaosababishwa na vitisho katika uchimbaji wa mnyama mvivu. Uvutaji unaweza kusababishwa pia kwa kuweka sum la kupalali kwenye macho na aina fulani za vidudu ambavyo vina uwezo wa kupalilia sum kama njia ya kujilinda. Majaribio yaliyopita ya kudhibiti uvutaji wa vidudu hayakufikia matokeo mazuri, na yalisababisha taarifa zisizo na msingi za ukiolojia. Watu wengi husita kufika kwenye kituo cha afya au hospitali badala yake, wategemea tiba za jadi.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **Uvutaji wa Vidudu:**  This is the standard Swahili term for "snakebite envenoming."
*   **Muhtasari:**  "Overview" is translated as "Muhtasari" which means summary or overview.
*   **Ugonjwa wa hatari sana:** "Potentially life-threatening disease" is rendered as "Ugonjwa wa hatari sana" – literally "a very dangerous disease."
*   **Mnyama mvivu:** "Venomous snake" is translated as "Mnyama mvivu."
*   **Sum la kupalali:** "Venom" is translated as "Sum la kupalali" – "sum of spitting."
*   **Aina fulani za vidudu:** "Certain species of snakes" is translated as "Aina fulani za vidudu" – "certain types of snakes."
*   **Kujilinda:** "As a defense measure" is translated as "Kujilinda" – "to protect themselves."
*   **Majaribio yaliyopita:** "Inadequate past efforts" is translated as "Majaribio yaliyopita" – "past attempts."
*   **Zisizo na msingi za ukiolojia:** "Fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data" is translated as "Zisizo na msingi za ukiolojia" – "without a basis for epidemiology."
*   **Wategemea tiba za jadi:** "Instead rely on traditional treatments" is translated as "Wategemea tiba za jadi" – "they rely on traditional treatments."

**Note:**  Swahili has regional variations. This translation aims for a generally understandable version across East Africa.  If you need a translation tailored to a specific region (e.g., Tanzania, Kenya, Uganda), there might be slight adjustments to vocabulary.

translations.source: However, available data show 4.5–5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8–2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable.
translations.reference: Hata hivyo, takwimu zinazopatikana zinaonyesha watu milioni 4.5–5.4 huumwa na nyoka kila mwaka. Kati ya hizi, milioni 1.8-2.7 hupata ugonjwa wa kliniki na 81,000 hadi 138,000 hufa kutokana na matatizo. Vikundi vilivyo katika hatari kubwa ni pamoja na wafanyikazi wa kilimo vijijini, wafugaji, wavuvi, wawindaji, watoto wanaofanya kazi, watu wanaoishi katika nyumba ambazo hazijajengwa vizuri na wale ambao wana fursa ndogo ya kupata elimu na huduma za afya. Maradhi na vifo hutokea mara nyingi zaidi miongoni mwa vijana na watoto hukumbwa na vifo vingi zaidi. Zaidi ya hayo, wanawake hupata vikwazo vilivyoongezeka vya kupata huduma za matibabu katika baadhi ya tamaduni na wanawake wajawazito wako katika hatari kubwa.

translations.source: An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical.
translations.reference: Mgogoro unaoendelea unaozuia upatikanaji wa matibabu salama na madhubuti ya antivenom katika maeneo mengi, na hasa Afrika Kusini mwa Jangwa la Sahara, ni sababu moja inayochangia uwezekano wa kutafuta msaada kupitia dawa za jadi. Dalili: Kuumwa au kunyunyiziwa sumu kutoka kwa nyoka wenye sumu kunaweza kusababisha aina mbalimbali za dharura za kimatibabu. Ugonjwa wa sumu kutoka kwa aina tofauti za nyoka unaweza kusababisha dalili tofauti, zingine mbaya zaidi kuliko zingine. Hii inafanya utayarishaji wa antivenino sahihi kuwa tatizo linaloendelea. Evenoming inaweza kusababisha kupooza hatari ambayo inaweza kuzuia kupumua, na kufanya matibabu ya haraka muhimu.
translations.hypothesis:

Mzio wa mzio unaweza kusababisha ulemewa mkubwa ambao unaweza kuzuia kuanikwa, ikifanya tiba ya mara moja iwe muhimu.**

translations.source: People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites.
translations.reference: Watu wanaweza pia kupata matatizo ya kutokwa na damu ambayo yanaweza kusababisha kuvuja damu mbaya au kushindwa kwa figo kusikoweza kurekebishwa. Uharibifu mkubwa wa tishu za ndani pia unaweza kutokea, ambayo inaweza kusababisha ulemavu wa kudumu na hata kukatwa kwa kiungo. Watoto wako katika hatari kubwa ya athari kali kutokana na uzito mdogo wa mwili kuliko watu wazima. Vifo vingi na madhara makubwa kutokana na kuumwa na nyoka vinaweza kuzuilika kabisa kwa kufanya antivenom salama na madhubuti zipatikane na kufikiwa zaidi, hasa katika maeneo yenye hatari kubwa. Dawa za kupambana na nyoka za ubora wa juu ndizo matibabu pekee madhubuti ya kuzuia au kubadilisha athari nyingi za sumu za kuumwa na nyoka.

Watoto wana hatari kubwa zaidi ya athari za kiafya zote kutokana na uzito mdogo kuliko watu wazima. Vifo na matokeo makubwa zaidi ya kuambukizwa na nyani yanaweza kuzuishwa kabisa kwa kimsingi tiba salama na yenye ufanisi ya mziozi, hasa katika maeneo yenye hatari kubwa. Mziozi wa ubora wa juu ndio tiba pekee yenye ufanisi wa kuzuia au kurekebisha madhara ya mziozi ya kuambukizwa na nyani.**

translations.source: Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: Matibabu: Dawa za kuua nyoka ni matibabu madhubuti ya kuzuia au kubadilisha athari nyingi za kuumwa na nyoka na zimejumuishwa katika orodha ya WHO ya dawa muhimu. Upatikanaji na ufikiwaji wa dawa hizi, pamoja na kuongeza uelewa juu ya mbinu za kimsingi za kuzuia miongoni mwa jamii na wahudumu wa afya, ni njia bora za kupunguza madhara makubwa na vifo kutokana na kuumwa na nyoka. Baada ya kuumwa na nyoka anayeshukiwa kuwa na sumu, fuata hatua hizi: Ondoka mara moja kutoka eneo ambalo kuumwa kulitokea. Ondoa kitu chochote kinachokaza karibu na sehemu ya mwili iliyoumwa ili kuepusha madhara ikiwa uvimbe utatokea.

Baada ya kuchapishwa na nyani iliyo shuhikiwa kuwa mwenye sumu, fuata hatua hizi:  Move immediately away from the area where the bite occurred.  Oa kitu gumu chochote karibu na sehemu iliyochapishwa ili kuzuia uharibifu ikiwa uvumbi utafanyika.**

**Explanation of some choices:**

*   **Matibabu:**  "Treatment" -  A standard translation.
*   **Antivenom za nyani:** "Snake antivenoms" -  Direct translation.
*   **tibia yenye tindo:** "effective treatments" -  "Tinda" means effective or useful.
*   **kuzuia au kurefusha athari mbaya:** "prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects" -  A clear way to express both actions.
*   **kuambukizwa na sumu ya nyani:** "snakebite envenoming" -  A common and understandable way to phrase this.
*   **zimejadiliwa katika orodha ya dawa muhimu za WHO:** "are included in the WHO list of essential medicines" -  "Zimejadiliwa" means "are listed" or "are included."
*   **Uwingi wa antivenom hizi na ufuatano wao:** "The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms" -  "Uwingi" refers to availability, and "Ufuatano" refers to accessibility.
*   **pamoja na kuongeza uelewa kuhusu njia za kuzuilia kwanza miongoni mwa jamii na wafanyakazi wa afya:** "along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers" -  This is a more detailed translation to capture the nuance of the original.
*   **kupunguza matokeo mabaya na vifo:** "to limit serious consequences and deaths" -  "Matokeo mabaya" means "serious consequences."

*   **Move immediately away from the area where the bite occurred:**  Direct translation.

*   **ili kuzuia uharibifu ikiwa uvumbi utafanyika:** "to avoid harm if swelling occurs" - "Uharibifu" means harm. "Uvumbi" means swelling.

**Important Note:**  Swahili has regional variations. This translation aims for a generally understandable version.  If you need a translation for a specific region (e.g., Tanzania, Kenya), the wording might need slight adjustments.

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe).
translations.reference: Mhakikishie mhathiriwa, kwani kuumwa na nyoka wengi wenye sumu hakusababishi kifo cha papo hapo. Zuisha mtu huyo kabisa na umpeleke kwenye kituo cha afya haraka iwezekanavyo Kuweka shinikizo kwenye sehemu za kung'atwa na padi ya shinikizo inayoweza kufaa katika baadhi ya matukio. Epuka njia za jadi za misaada ya kwanza au dawa za mitishamba. Paracetamol inaweza kutolewa kwa maumivu ya ndani (ambayo inaweza kuwa kali).
translations.hypothesis:

**Uhamishie usawa kwa shuhuda, kwa sababu ufarahia wa uhuni kutoka kwa michimbuko ya nyani mengi haukubaki kwa ajali.**  **Imarishia mtu kabisa na upeleke mtu huyo hospitali kwa haraka iwezekanayo.**  **Kuweka shinina kwenye tovuti ya michimbuko kwa pedi ya shinina inaweza kuwa sahihi katika baadhi ya matendo. Usitumie tiba ya kwanza ya jadi au dawa za nyumba ya binadamu.**  **Paracetamol inaweza kutolewa kwa ugonjwa wa mguu (ambayo inaweza kuwa mkali sana).**

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

*   **Uhamishie usawa:** "Reassure" -  This translates to "bring peace/comfort" which is a common and appropriate way to express reassurance in Swahili.
*   **kwa sababu ufarahia wa uhuni kutoka kwa michimbuko ya nyani mengi haukubaki kwa ajali:** "as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death" - This is a more detailed explanation to convey the seriousness of the situation.
*   **Imarishia mtu kabisa:** "Immobilize the person completely" - "Imarisha" means to strengthen or stabilize, and combined with "mtu" (person) conveys immobilization effectively.
*   **upeleke mtu huyo hospitali kwa haraka iwezekanayo:** "transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible" -  "Upeleke" means to lead or take, and "hospitali" is hospital.
*   **Kuweka shinina kwenye tovuti ya michimbuko kwa pedi ya shinina:** "Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad" - "Shinina" means pressure.
*   **inaweza kuwa sahihi katika baadhi ya matendo:** "may be suitable in some cases" -  "Sahihi" means suitable or correct.
*   **Usitumie tiba ya kwanza ya jadi au dawa za nyumba ya binadamu:** "Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines" - "Usitumie" means "do not use."
*   **Paracetamol inaweza kutolewa kwa ugonjwa wa mguu:** "Paracetamol may be given for local pain" - "Kutolewa" means to administer or give. "Ugonjwa wa mguu" means local pain.

**Important Note:**  This translation is based on my understanding of Swahili and medical terminology. For critical medical information, it's always best to have a professional Swahili-speaking medical translator review the text.

translations.source: Vomiting may occur, so place the person on their left side in the recovery position. Closely monitor airway and breathing and be ready to resuscitate if necessary
